subject: A Review of Set Theory
question: List the elements of the following sets. (a) $\{x \mid x \text{ is a real number such that } x^2 = 1\}$. (b) $\{x \mid x \text{ is an integer such that } x^2 - 3 = 0\}$.
explanation: (a) $\{-1, 1\}$. (b) Since the only solutions to the given equation are $-\sqrt{3}$ and $\sqrt{3}$ and both are not integers, the set in question is the empty set
